data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented as required. While the linked use case mentions an automated reminder for a specific task, it does not provide comprehensive evidence that auto-reminders are triggered for all incomplete items across the checklist. This indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence that auto-reminders are sent for all incomplete checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that auto-reminders are sent for all incomplete items in the checklist.
